communitySummaries.0: Retrieves, parses, caches, and synchronizes radiosonde launch and sounding data for weather reporting.
communitySummaries.1: Manages rocket launch scheduling, data synchronization, and month‑based display, including cancellation and confirmation flows.
communitySummaries.2: Handles fetching radiosonde flight data and rendering live and historical balloon icons and legends on a map interface.
communitySummaries.3: Manages caching, retrieval, and statistical analysis of weather station data across years and months, and supports confidence calculations and synchronization.
communitySummaries.5: Manages CRUD and sync of yearly store data in a bucket, including matching and status tracking operations.
communitySummaries.6: Handles station lookup, selection, and UI state for weather balloon launches, enabling navigation and mapping of launch sites.
communitySummaries.9: Handles loading, displaying, and modifying a paginated file list with delete support and progress tracking.
communitySummaries.10: Manages the state and data needed to create, display, and toggle station entries while handling loading status, errors, and chart visualizations.
communitySummaries.11: Provides tools for calculating geographic bearings, distances, trajectory analysis, landing density, and annual metrics for flight or navigation data.
communitySummaries.12: It manages rendering a map view, handling markers, info balloons, and associated UI state such as error and status.
communitySummaries.13: Handles generation of URLs and formatting for retrieving and interpreting Wyoming weather sounding data and associated date-time information.
communitySummaries.15: Manages application configuration values, providing defaults and defining storage keys.
communitySummaries.17: Handles metadata and viewport settings to control how a web page is rendered and displayed on different devices.
communitySummaries.19: Tracks a user's flight activity for the day, recording how many flights were taken, whether a flight occurred today, and the month.
communitySummaries.20: Manages query input, selection state, and displays the search results.

communitySummaries.22: Manages compiling code, creating distributable packages, and configuring deployment targets.

communitySummaries.24: Stores and formats data for generating monthly visualizations.
communitySummaries.25: Handles mapping of numeric months to full month names for display.
communitySummaries.26: Keeps track of whether an element is selected and its position within the layout.
communitySummaries.27: Defines build‑time and runtime settings for a Next.js application, such as environment variables, routing, and transpilation options.
